mission.title: About
mission.description: We are a technology company and a research lab developing an Emotional Audiovisual Language Model (AVLM), trained on ethically-sourced creative content. By teaching AI to understand emotion, narrative, and intention in audiovisual media, we unlock unprecedented tools for creators, brands, and platforms.

dataQuality.title: Why High-Quality Data is the Key to Unlocking Emotion
dataQuality.description: The quality of an AI model is a direct function of the data it's trained on. Today's large-scale models are built on billions of hours of scraped, low-quality, and often ethically questionable internet data. This leads to models that can recognize basic patterns but fail to grasp the rich, subtle tapestry of human emotion.

ethicalData.title: Ethical Data
ethicalData.description: We are building our foundation on a rights-first, voluntarily contributed dataset. Through our flagship product, Axessible, we've created a virtuous cycle. Creators who use our platform to make their content compliant with new regulations are also giving us permission to learn from their work.

powerOfIntentionality.title: The Power of Intentionality
powerOfIntentionality.description: Scraped internet content captures what people watch, but not why they created it. Our data, contributed by filmmakers, advertisers, and artists, is rich with creative purpose. Our AVLM goes beyond a basic emotional fingerprint and understands the narrative beats, creative tropes, and emotional arcs that make content truly great.

builtOnTrust.title: Built on Trust
builtOnTrust.description: Our data is not just a collection of pixels and audio waves; it is a repository of human creativity and emotion, annotated by the creators themselves. This proprietary dataset will allow us to train a model with a level of depth and nuance no other company can achieve.

aiLab.title: Our AI research lab
aiLab.description: Building the next generation of AI that understands and enhances human creativity through our Emotional Audiovisual Language Model.

useCases.title: Broader Use Cases & IP Strategy
useCases.description: The applications of an AVLM trained on a high-quality, creative-led dataset extend far beyond our initial product, Axessvideo Platform. Our technology powers a new class of tools across diverse industries.

emotionalResonance.title: Emotional Resonance Testing
emotionalResonance.description: Analyze how an audience emotionally connects with an ad at a granular level, pinpointing moments of awe, frustration, or delight.

narrativeOptimization.title: Narrative Optimization
narrativeOptimization.description: Identify which scenes or narrative beats in a campaign are most effective at driving emotional engagement and brand recall.

crossCulturalInsights.title: Cross-Cultural Insights
crossCulturalInsights.description: Automatically detect culturally specific emotional nuances and creative tropes to optimize content for global markets.

filmTv.title: Narrative Feedback for Film & TV Studios:

editingPostProduction.title: Editing & Post-Production
editingPostProduction.description: Provide real-time, emotional feedback to editors, helping them craft scenes that land with the intended emotional impact.

scriptAnalysis.title: Script Analysis
scriptAnalysis.description: Analyze a script's narrative arc and emotional flow before production begins, identifying potential weaknesses or opportunities.

characterDevelopment.title: Character Development
characterDevelopment.description: Study how audiences respond to a character's emotional journey over a film or series.

emotionallyAwareVideo.title: Emotionally-Aware Generative Video
emotionallyAwareVideo.description: Use our AVLM to guide text-to-video models to create content with specific emotional tones and narrative structures.

dynamicMusic.title: Dynamic Music & Sound Design
dynamicMusic.description: Generate music or soundscapes that adapt to the emotional arc of a video in real-time.

emotionBasedCuration.title: Emotion-Based Curation
emotionBasedCuration.description: Recommend content not just by genre, but by the emotional journey it provides. For example, a "comforting" playlist of short films or an "awe-inspiring" feed of documentaries.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property & Patent Areas:
intellectualProperty.description: Our research into emotional AI has led to breakthrough innovations across multiple patent-eligible areas:

emotionNarrative.title: Emotion-Narrative Fusion
emotionNarrative.description: Methods for synchronizing AI-generated emotional analysis with narrative structure recognition to create contextually aware content recommendations and generation tools.

explainableAvlm.title: Explainable AV-LM
explainableAvlm.description: Techniques for creating interpretable audiovisual language models that can articulate why specific content evokes particular emotional responses, enabling creators to understand and replicate successful creative patterns.

interactiveCreativeCritique.title: Interactive Creative Critique
interactiveCreativeCritique.description: Real-time feedback systems that analyze creative content during production and provide actionable insights for enhancing emotional impact and narrative coherence.

cta.title: Ready to explore the future of emotional AI?
cta.description: Join us in building technology that doesn't just process content—it understands the human experience behind it.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Features
accessibility.audioDescriptionsDesc: Describes visual elements for screen readers

transcriptTab.title: Transcript Extraction & Character Management
transcriptTab.description: Extract speech from the video with automatic speaker identification and vocal intensity analysis. Captions are automatically enhanced for accessibility.
transcriptTab.autoEnhancedDesc: Speaker identification and vocal intensity analysis run automatically when you generate or load transcripts. Results are applied directly to captions for better accessibility.
transcriptTab.speakerDesc: Manage character colors and connect speakers to characters. Changes update captions immediately and follow the Captions with Intention protocol.

videoAnalysis.title: Video Analysis
videoAnalysis.description: Analyze video content for silent gaps and generate storytelling audio descriptions using AI.
videoAnalysis.silentGapsDesc: Customize the prompt to adjust how silent gaps are detected and described. Will analyze the complete video duration (up to 1 hour) and process up to 100 silent moments for comprehensive coverage.
videoAnalysis.noResults: Run analysis to see silent gaps and narrations.
videoAnalysis.noSegments: No silent segments found in this video.
videoAnalysis.customAnalysisDesc: Enter a custom prompt to extract specific insights from your video content (e.g., generate hashtags, identify themes, extract key quotes, summarize main points).
videoAnalysis.customPromptPlaceholder: Enter a custom prompt to extract specific insights from your video (e.g., generate hashtags, identify themes, extract key quotes, etc.)
videoAnalysis.customPromptExample: e.g. Generate 10 relevant hashtags for this video, or Summarize the main points discussed, or Extract all product mentions...
videoAnalysis.customPromptEmpty: Enter a custom prompt above and click "Analyze" to generate insights.

audioDescEditor.title: Audio Description Generation
audioDescEditor.description: Enable audio descriptions for visual elements in the video.
audioDescEditor.editorDesc: Generate and manage audio descriptions to describe visual elements for accessibility.
audioDescEditor.step1: Step 1: Select your preferred audio description voice from the dropdown above.
audioDescEditor.step2Basic: Basic AI: Quick generation of simple descriptions for common scenarios
audioDescEditor.step2Advanced: Advanced Analysis: Comprehensive video analysis that detects silent moments and generates detailed cinematic descriptions
audioDescEditor.step3: Step 3: After generation, click "Analyze for Extended Audio Description" to check if descriptions fit within dialogue gaps.
audioDescEditor.step4: Step 4: Edit descriptions as needed, then click "Generate Audio" for each segment or "Generate All Audio" for batch processing.
audioDescEditor.step5: Step 5: Save your work using "Save All" to persist changes to the database.

export.title: Export Accessible Video
export.description: Download your video with accessibility features burned-in.
export.noTranscript: Generate a transcript first to enable export with captions.
export.originalPrompt: Need a copy now? Download the original video.
export.captionsDesc: Burn-in word-by-word captions with character colors
export.audioDescDesc: Mix audio descriptions with ducked program audio
export.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one accessibility feature to export.

characterManager.title: Character Management
characterManager.description: Configure character colors, voices, and speech patterns
characterManager.colorAttributionDesc: Assign colors to characters following the Captions with Intention protocol.
characterManager.speakerAssignmentDesc: Map each character to a detected transcript speaker. Colors come from Character Management.
characterManager.name: Name
characterManager.detectedMappingDesc: Map this character to a detected speaker (A, B, C, etc.) for automatic color attribution
characterManager.noCharactersDesc: Add characters to enable color-coded captions
characterManager.guideline1: Main characters use the 6 primary spectrum colors
characterManager.guideline2: Supporting characters use colors between main character colors
characterManager.guideline3: Minor characters use pastel tones from the center of the color wheel
characterManager.guideline4: Hero and Villain should be positioned opposite on the spectrum
characterManager.guideline5: Off-camera dialogue is displayed in italic

speakerMapping.title: Speaker Assignment
speakerMapping.description: Map each character to a detected transcript speaker. Colors come from Character Management.

errors.failedApplyMapping: Failed to apply mapping to transcript segments

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe that creative expression should be accessible to everyone. Our AI-powered platform transforms video content into immersive experiences that break down barriers and create inclusive storytelling.

dataQuality.title: Data Quality & Ethics
dataQuality.description: Our approach to artificial intelligence is built on principles of transparency, consent, and creative enhancement rather than replacement.

ethicalData.title: Ethical Data Collection
ethicalData.description: We prioritize consent-driven data collection and transparent AI training processes that respect creator rights and user privacy.

powerOfIntentionality.title: The Power of Intentionality
powerOfIntentionality.description: Every algorithm decision is designed to amplify human creativity, not replace it. Our AI serves as a creative collaborator.

builtOnTrust.title: Built on Trust
builtOnTrust.description: Transparency in our AI processes ensures creators maintain control while benefiting from enhanced accessibility features.

aiLab.title: AI Research Lab
aiLab.subtitle: Pushing the boundaries of creative intelligence through ethical AI development and human-centered design.

emotionalResonance.description: Understand how your content emotionally connects with audiences through advanced sentiment analysis and engagement prediction.

narrativeOptimization.title: Narrative Optimization
narrativeOptimization.description: AI-powered insights help optimize storytelling structure, pacing, and emotional arc for maximum audience impact.

crossCulturalInsights.title: Cross-Cultural Insights
crossCulturalInsights.description: Analyze how content performs across different cultural contexts and adapt messaging for global audiences.

editingPostProduction.title: Editing & Post-Production
editingPostProduction.description: Streamline editing workflows with AI-generated scene summaries, emotional beat detection, and automated accessibility features.

characterDevelopment.title: Character Development
